_readme: Beta-flag allowlist. Gatekeepers: edit this file via PR to add/remove access. Each flag maps to a description + an allow list of actor_id UUIDs. Use the literal string '*' inside allow[] to open a flag to everyone (e.g. when promoting to GA). For local dev, set NEXT_PUBLIC_BETA_ALL_ON=1 in frontend/.env.local to bypass all gates.

standings.description: Canonical scoreboard at /standings — merged GT gate + peer-trust rank. Gated while we validate the scoring model.
